education_required: ITI / Diploma in Tool & Die Making / Machinist
raw_text:
20. Tool Room Machinist

Job Summary  
Works in a tool room environment to produce and maintain high -precision tooling 
components.  
Key Responsibilities  
• Manufacture and repair tools, dies, and molds  
• Operate both manual and CNC m achines  
• Perform precision fitting and finishing  
• Assist in tool assembly and trials  
• Maintain high accuracy standards  
Required Skills  
• Combined CNC and manual machining skills  
• Tool room practices and standards  
• High attention to detail  
• Measurement exper tise  
Qualification  
• ITI / Diploma in Tool & Die / Machinist  
Experience  
• 3–6 years  
Salary (India)  
• ₹22,000 – ₹40,000 per month
